title: ollama-sdks
summary: Official docs listing community SDKs for Go, Ruby, PHP, Rust, C#, Elixir, and more.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and create models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama LLM and embeddings integrations to LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI); chat, model management, RAG, multi-user.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, written in Go.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing GitHub Copilot-like autocomplete powered by Ollama models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: Community C#/.NET client for Ollama with both sync and async APIs.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Experimental Terraform provider to manage Ollama models and configurations as code.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-github-actions
summary: GitHub Action to install and start Ollama in CI pipelines for testing LLM apps.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that streams Ollama model responses into chat threads using slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI template for Ollama with session memory and model selector.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration enabling Ollama models as Generators and Embedders in pipelines.
